hooks.command: cd /home/user/roadmap-tool && ts_out=$(bun run typecheck 2>&1); ts_exit=$?; bunx biome format --write ./src >/dev/null 2>&1; lint_out=$(bunx biome lint ./src 2>&1); lint_exit=$?; [ $ts_exit -ne 0 ] && ts_status="FAILED" || ts_status="OK"; [ $lint_exit -ne 0 ] && lint_status="FAILED" || lint_status="OK"; { [ $ts_exit -ne 0 ] || [ $lint_exit -ne 0 ]; } && prefix="⚠️ Checks completed with errors" || prefix="✅ All checks passed"; jq -n --arg p "$prefix" --arg ts "$ts_status" --arg lint "$lint_status" '{"systemMessage": ($p + ":\n[TypeScript] " + $ts + "\n[Lint] " + $lint)}'
hooks.statusMessage: Running TypeScript check, formatter, and linter...
